---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the PHP SDK
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that the SDK doesn't support (or makes awkward)?

## Proposed solution

How you'd like it to work — a sketch of the API surface helps:

```php
// example of the call you wish existed
```

## Alternatives considered

Workarounds you're using today, other SDKs that do this well, etc.

## Additional context

Anything else (links, API docs, related issues).

> Note: features that require **API/platform** changes (new endpoints, new webhook events)
> belong with the Liquidafy platform team — email support@liquidafy.com instead.
